tool_args.label: Non-Labor Expense Drivers YTD March 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Non-Labor Expenses $10.4 million unfavorable. Electric Power $2.0M unfavorable, Fuel $0.5M unfavorable, Materials & Supplies $9.0M unfavorable primarily due to timing of modifications and RCM activity for revenue fleet.

payload.claim_text: Non-Labor Expenses were $10.4 million unfavorable primarily due to higher consumption and rates for Electric Power, higher rates and consumption for Fuel, and the timing of modifications and RCM activity for revenue fleet and miscellaneous inventory adjustment for Materials & Supplies.

tool_args.label: Labor Expense Drivers YTD March 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Labor Expenses $10.1 million favorable. Payroll $4.7M favorable, Overtime $6.2M unfavorable, Health & Welfare $7.6M favorable, Pensions $2.6M favorable.

payload.claim_text: Labor Expenses were $10.1 million favorable driven by lower average pay rates reflecting new hires for Payroll, lower rates and vacant positions for Health & Welfare, and the timing of pension payments for Pensions, partially offset by higher weather-related overtime and maintenance overtime.

tool_args.label: Revenue Drivers YTD March 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Farebox Revenues $9.1M favorable to budget driven by higher paid ridership, partially offset by lower yield per passenger. Other Operating Revenues $6.1M favorable primarily due to FEMA loss recovery revenue and rental revenue.

payload.claim_text: Farebox Revenues were $9.1 million favorable to the budget due to higher paid ridership, partially offset by lower yield per passenger. Other Operating Revenues were $6.1 million favorable to the budget primarily due to FEMA loss recovery revenue and rental revenue.

tool_args.label: Overtime Drivers YTD March 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Total overtime $7.7M unfavorable. Non-reimbursable $6.2M unfavorable due to higher weather-related overtime and maintenance overtime.

payload.claim_text: Total overtime was $7.7 million unfavorable. Non-reimbursable overtime was $6.2 million unfavorable due to higher weather-related overtime and maintenance overtime.

tool_args.label: Non-Reimbursable Overtime Overspend Drivers
tool_args.raw_text: Overspend of $6.2M vs Adopted Budget primarily due to unfavorable Weather Emergencies, Programmatic/Routine Maintenance, and Unscheduled Maintenance.

payload.claim_text: Overspend of $6.2M vs Adopted Budget primarily due to unfavorable Weather Emergencies, Programmatic/Routine Maintenance, and Unscheduled Maintenance.

tool_args.label: Reimbursable Overtime Overspend Drivers
tool_args.raw_text: Overspend of $1.6M vs Adopted Budget driven by various capital projects and Transportation flagging needs.

payload.claim_text: Overspend of $1.6M vs Adopted Budget driven by various capital projects and Transportation flagging needs.
